name: Acrylic - New Tab
description: Premium glassmorphism New Tab. Tasks, Pomodoro timer, notes, and 8 themes built in. Sub-100ms load. Free forever. Zero tracking.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; img-src 'self' http: https: data: blob:; frame-src 'self' https://youtube.com https://www.youtube.com https://youtube-nocookie.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com
